title: CAPIT States | Compare Well Plugging by State
description: Explore CAPIT’s state-by-state pages for well-plugging records, source agencies, recent activity, and coverage notes.
headline: Explore Well Plugging by State
body: Browse the states CAPIT currently covers, compare high-level activity, and open detailed state pages for source definitions, recent records, and publication notes.

sections.heading: Compare States with Context
sections.body: A good state comparison view does more than rank totals. It should also show coverage scope, update cadence, and the agency behind the numbers.

sections.heading: Search and Sort
sections.body: Search by state name, sort by published records, recent activity, freshness, or alphabetical order, and switch between list and map views.

sections.heading: State Card Labels
sections.body: Each state card should clearly show source agency, last refresh, and a coverage note.
